channel.title: AI on Etsub Feleke
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Etsub Feleke

item.title: Cognitive Canvas : Exploring the Model Context Protocol (MCP).
item.description: Cognitive Canvas is an MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server that acts as a persistent memory layer for Claude Desktop and Copilot. It allows the AI to save URLs, categorize content, and generate quizzes for active recall.

item.title: Auto-Bench : Benchmarking Multi-Tool LLM Agents
item.description:
<!-- Auto Bench is a reproducible benchmarking framework that evaluates multi-tool LLM agents by measuring their process (tool selection, reasoning, action sequencing), not just outcomes.
Key Points: - Compares Gemini 2.5 Flash vs GPT-4o-mini across three agent configurations (no-tool, single-tool, multi-tool) - Uses a sandboxed environment with static local documents for reproducibility - Tests 40 public health scenarios with automated evaluation - Results: Gemini 2.5 Flash achieved 80% success on multi-tool tasks vs GPT-4o-mini's 45%, though GPT-4o-mini is cheaper - Finding: Many failures were architectural (missing context) rather than model limitations, highlighting that system design matters as much as model selection -->
